story_overview: A poetic visual story about Vincent van Gogh’s artistic journey — from humble beginnings in a small room, to moments of inspiration in the fields of Arles, and finally peaceful reflection under the starry night. The short film captures passion, struggle, and the beauty Vincent van Gogh saw in the world through light and color. The tone is emotional yet calm, celebrating creativity and inner light.
reconstruct_target: [Person A] middle-aged man with unkempt reddish-blond hair and thin reddish beard wearing simple worn painter clothing

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with unkempt reddish-blond hair and thin reddish beard wearing simple worn painter clothing; shot caption: [Person A] sits at a wooden table in a dim attic studio, facing a blank canvas among scattered paint tubes and brushes. He leans slightly forward, deep in thought, as soft sunlight passes through a small window and warm shadows settle across the walls.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with unkempt reddish-blond hair and thin reddish beard wearing simple worn painter clothing; shot caption: [Person A] dips a brush into vivid yellow paint and lays the first bold strokes on a canvas. He keeps his gaze fixed intensely on the canvas while one hand steadies a wooden palette near the table edge, his hands moving with deliberate care.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with unkempt reddish-blond hair and thin reddish beard wearing simple worn painter clothing; shot caption: [Person A] stands back from the wooden table and studies the painted canvas beside a flickering candle. He lowers his brush slightly, loosens his shoulders, and exhales deeply in reflection as moving shadows cast by the candle dance across the walls.
first_frame_prompt: Middle-aged male painter Vincent van Gogh with unkempt reddish-blond hair, thin reddish beard, angular pale face, lean build, expressive blue-green eyes, and simple worn painter clothing sits at a wooden table in a dim Paris attic studio, facing a blank canvas among scattered paint tubes and brushes.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with unkempt reddish-blond hair and thin reddish beard wearing simple worn painter clothing; shot caption: [Person A] guides a paintbrush across the canvas, building thick yellow and orange petals with visible ridges of paint. global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with unkempt reddish-blond hair and thin reddish beard wearing simple worn painter clothing; shot caption: [Person A] steps back from the easel in the sunflower field and looks over the completed bright canvas beneath the vast blue sky.
